_comment: Submit LP + TY together: POST /api/zenith/content/bulk. thankYouPageUrl is auto-set on the LP from the TY page title.

seo.metaDescription: Forensic analysis of recorded sales calls.

components.answer: A good sales call can feel productive while the buyer has already mentally exited.

components.heading: Why this matters
components.body: Invisible drift ends deals before the call ends.

faqs.question: What is forensic analysis?
faqs.answer: Structured review of recorded calls for drift and exit phrases.

pages.title: Thank You — The Call Felt Fine

seo.metaTitle: Thank You | The Call Felt Fine
seo.metaDescription: Your forensic evidence file is on the way.

components.headline: Check your inbox
components.subheadline: Your 11-page forensic evidence file is on the way.

components.heading: What happens next
components.body: Review the file, then upload a call if you want a Sherpa read.
